name: Graham Cracker Quickie
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs thoroughly and add sugar, mixing well.
2. Fold in chopped walnuts, graham cracker crumbs, and salt until combined.
3. Spread mixture evenly in a greased 9-inch pie pan.
4. Bake for 25 minutes at 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Serve warm with whipped cream on top. Enjoy its chewy and delicious texture.
